effects.text: burn this card as a +1 stealth action that costs 2 blood (allies cannot pay blood costs

Strike: 1 damage and put this card on the opposing minion. The attached minion gets -1 strength (after the current strike resolution step). The attached minion can burn this card as a +1 stealth action that costs 2 blood (allies cannot pay blood costs).
